ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "npi" TEXT /* National Provider Identifier (NPI) for the provider */,
  "entity_type_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating the type of entity (1 for individual, 2 for organization) */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization (if applicable) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual provider (if applicable) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual provider (if applicable) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider operates */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version identifier for the provider data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the provider record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "primary_specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary specialty of the provider */,
  "primary_taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary taxonomy of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_entity_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type_code") REFERENCES entity_types ("entity_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "entity_type_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating the type of entity (1 for individual, 2 for organization) */,
  "entity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the entity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomies" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomy */,
  "taxonomy_code" TEXT /* Code of the taxonomy */,
  "taxonomy_description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomy */,
  "parent_taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxonomy (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the taxonomy is a primary classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_taxonomies" (
  "provider_taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-taxonomy relationship */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomy */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the taxonomy is the primary classification for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_taxonomy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_taxonomies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_taxonomies_taxonomy_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomy_id") REFERENCES taxonomies ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the provider data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "line_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is the primary address for the provider */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_addresses_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., office, mobile, fax) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact for the provider */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact information was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_contacts_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., medical, dental) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "issuing_state" TEXT /* State that issued the license */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license needs to be renewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_licenses_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "specialty_description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the specialty is the primary specialty for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_specialties_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was obtained */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Certifying body */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification needs to be renewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the certification (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_certifications_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "is_highest_degree" INTEGER /* Indicates if the degree is the highest degree obtained by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_education_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data of the provider version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_versions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
